profile.name: Dev Jain
profile.bio: Full-Stack & Native Apps Engineer specializing in the JavaScript ecosystem (React Native, Next.js, MERN). I bridge the gap between high-level vision and production-ready systems, focusing on scalable architecture, performance, and rapid product iteration to drive long-term business growth.

points: Streamlined the development-to-deployment pipeline, implementing CI/CD and OTA updates that cut internal testing cycles by 20%.
Migrated legacy architecture to a modern, scalable architecture, significantly improving overall app performance and maintainability.
Transformed the codebase to be agent-ready, enabling faster feature delivery while reducing token consumption by 45%.
Architected the frontend for the 'Planet Points' product launch using React Native, driving a 30% growth in user acquisition.
Rapidly engineered and deployed the 'Receipt Scanning' ecosystem within a 2-week sprint, driving a 15% surge in daily active usage.
Executed a comprehensive optimization of the application architecture, slashing the app bundle size by 100 MB.
Built and maintained dynamic websites for clients using React and PHP, tailored to business-specific needs.
Delivered clean, responsive UIs with optimized performance across devices.

education.institution: Madhav Institute of Technology and Science, Gwalior

projects.title: E-commerce Platform API
projects.description: A scalable RESTful API for an e-commerce site using Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.

projects.title: Real-time Chat Application
projects.description: A full-stack chat app featuring WebSockets, React for the frontend, and user authentication.

projects.title: Cloud Deployment Automation
projects.description: CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions to automate testing and deployment to AWS.
